meta.description: Agent response for DAB Yelp Query 1 — ground truth verification artifact

query.question: What is the average rating of all businesses located in Indianapolis, Indiana?

query_trace.operation: find with regex filter for Indianapolis
query_trace.note: Agent filtered to 8 confirmed Indianapolis businesses after reviewing descriptions

query_trace.operation: Flat average of all ratings for 8 Indianapolis businesses
query_trace.aggregation: flat average across all review rows (not average of per-business averages)

context_layers_used.agent_md: Loaded at session start — routing table, R1-R4 rules, CORRECTION 1 (join key translation)
context_layers_used.corrections_log: CORRECTION 1 applied — businessid_N → businessref_N, never average per-business averages
context_layers_used.domain_kb: yelp-domain.md — Indianapolis regex pattern, cross-DB join key format
context_layers_used.live_schema: MongoDB businessinfo_database schema + DuckDB user_database schema introspected at session start

self_correction_applied.note: Query executed correctly on first attempt with CORRECTION 1 already in context
